creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
While testing some ports with pkgng I noticed that the viewnior pkg-plist has a problem.

It's trying to rm files from ${PREFIX}/lib/locale and also removing
NLS directories which are part of the standard mtree.

This slipped by me when originally committing the port unluckily.

Attached patch fixes it. Patch also strips Makefile headers and bumps PORTREVISION.
